title: Clipboard API blocked when accessing n8n over HTTP
symptom: When trying to copy nodes from a non-localhost instance of n8n, the clipboard does not capture the content. This issue does not occur when accessing n8n via localhost.
applies_when: Accessing n8n from a different device
root_cause: The Clipboard API, which is necessary for copy-pasting functionality, is restricted by browsers to work only over secure contexts (HTTPS) or localhost. When accessing n8n over plain HTTP from another device, the clipboard operations are blocked.
fix_steps: Enable the flag and add your n8n URL to the list.
Restart Chrome for the changes to take effect.
agent_instruction: Enable the insecure origin flag in Chrome and add your n8n URL to allow clipboard access.
safety_notes: Using this flag can expose your clipboard data to security risks; consider using HTTPS for production.
